m0.config_loads.note: config.yaml parses into GlassboxConfig without error

m0.test_suite_passing.note: pytest exits zero with zero failures

m0.lint_clean.note: ruff check glassbox/ tests/ exits zero

m1.delisted_coverage_pct.note: min pct of universe-months that include eventually-delisted names; stop-and-report gate per config.yaml validation.min_pct_universe_months_with_delisted

m1.candidate_pct_delisted.note: pct of full Tiingo-covered US-stock candidate pool (active+delisted) that is delisted; sanity check before sampling/universe construction

m2.adversarial_tests_passing.note: AsOfAccessor adversarial test suite (future-data refusal, future-split refusal, monotonic clock, staleness-aware tradability) all pass

m2.corporate_action_handcheck_passing.note: 2-for-1 split and cash dividend backward-adjustment reconstruction matches hand-calculated expected values

m3.backtest_core_tests_passing.note: hand-reconciled buy-and-hold/all-cash P&L, correct cost/turnover deduction, proof of no same-bar fill, correct rebalance position close-out

m4.factor_decile_monotonicity.note: momentum, reversal, low-vol each produce a monotonic decile spread on synthetic price paths

m4.fundamental_seam_refuses_non_pit.note: SizeFactor (FMP shares-outstanding), ValueFactor, QualityFactor all correctly refuse via the PIT-integrity check rather than computing on non-PIT data

m5.lookahead_audit_catches_injected_leak.note: deliberately injected leak (peeking N days ahead) produces a measurable, positive NAV/Sharpe improvement vs the honest as-of run

m5.deflated_and_haircut_sharpe_implement.note: Deflated Sharpe Ratio (Bailey & Lopez de Prado) and a simplified Harvey-Liu-style Bonferroni haircut Sharpe both implemented and tested for correct monotonic degradation with more trials

m5.survivorship_and_cost_sensitivity_imp.note: reusable survivorship-sensitivity and cost-sensitivity delta calculators (bps and Sharpe) tested against synthetic return series

m5.walk_forward_harness_implemented.note: strict chronological train/test split with independent, non-compounding in-sample/out-of-sample backtest windows

m1.survivorship_return_inflation_bps.note: annualized return inflation (bps) from using a survivors-only universe vs the full survivorship-aware universe; target is just >0 to confirm the bias is demonstrable in this sample

m1.gate_passed.note: M1 stop-and-report gate: delisted coverage pct >= config.validation.min_pct_universe_months_with_delisted (0.05)

m5.momentum.naive_sharpe.note: momentum naive (net) Sharpe on real cached data, 47yr sample, ~95 tickers post liquidity/data-quality filter

m5.momentum.deflated_sharpe.note: momentum Deflated Sharpe Ratio (probability true Sharpe > 0, corrected for 3 factor trials)

m5.momentum.haircut_sharpe.note: momentum Bonferroni-style haircut Sharpe (simplified Harvey-Liu approximation)

m5.momentum.cost_drag_bps.note: momentum annualized return drag (bps) from gross to net of transaction costs

m5.momentum.survivorship_return_inflatio.note: momentum annualized return inflation (bps) from survivors-only vs full survivorship-aware universe

m5.momentum.in_sample_vs_out_of_sample_s.note: momentum walk-forward: in-sample Sharpe vs out-of-sample Sharpe (chronological 70/30 split)

m5.reversal.naive_sharpe.note: reversal naive (net) Sharpe on real cached data, 47yr sample, ~95 tickers post liquidity/data-quality filter

m5.reversal.deflated_sharpe.note: reversal Deflated Sharpe Ratio (probability true Sharpe > 0, corrected for 3 factor trials)

m5.reversal.haircut_sharpe.note: reversal Bonferroni-style haircut Sharpe (simplified Harvey-Liu approximation)

m5.reversal.cost_drag_bps.note: reversal annualized return drag (bps) from gross to net of transaction costs

m5.reversal.survivorship_return_inflatio.note: reversal annualized return inflation (bps) from survivors-only vs full survivorship-aware universe

m5.reversal.in_sample_vs_out_of_sample_s.note: reversal walk-forward: in-sample Sharpe vs out-of-sample Sharpe (chronological 70/30 split)

m5.low_vol.naive_sharpe.note: low_vol naive (net) Sharpe on real cached data, 47yr sample, ~95 tickers post liquidity/data-quality filter

m5.low_vol.deflated_sharpe.note: low_vol Deflated Sharpe Ratio (probability true Sharpe > 0, corrected for 3 factor trials)

m5.low_vol.haircut_sharpe.note: low_vol Bonferroni-style haircut Sharpe (simplified Harvey-Liu approximation)

m5.low_vol.cost_drag_bps.note: low_vol annualized return drag (bps) from gross to net of transaction costs

m5.low_vol.survivorship_return_inflation.note: low_vol annualized return inflation (bps) from survivors-only vs full survivorship-aware universe

m5.low_vol.in_sample_vs_out_of_sample_sh.note: low_vol walk-forward: in-sample Sharpe vs out-of-sample Sharpe (chronological 70/30 split)

m6.dashboard_runs_locally.note: Streamlit dashboard verified end-to-end with Playwright: loads, runs backtest, shows naive/deflated/haircut Sharpe, equity curve, drawdown, rolling Sharpe, decile chart, turnover/costs, exports tearsheet HTML — all with zero console errors

m6.api_and_dashboard_identical.note: dashboard and CLI/tests both call glassbox.strategy.run_strategy() directly — single implementation, proven identical by test_strategy.py

m6.tearsheet_export_works.note: HTML tearsheet exported from dashboard button click verified to contain matching naive/deflated/haircut Sharpe numbers
